name: Semantic UI React
description: The official React integration for Semantic UI with declarative, jQuery-free components

description.value: The official React integration for Semantic UI with declarative, jQuery-free components

active-maintenance.comment: Active development with v3.0.0-beta.2 released December 2023. Repository shows 3,139 commits and ongoing contributions from 327+ contributors.

initial-release.comment: Initial development began in 2015 as the official React integration for Semantic UI.

latest-release.comment: v3.0.0-beta.2 released December 30, 2023. Stable version is 2.1.5.

styling-approach.comment: Components render valid Semantic UI HTML without bundled CSS. Requires importing Semantic UI CSS separately. Theming uses LESS/SCSS.

component-model.comment: Ready-to-use styled components following the Semantic UI design language.

typescript.comment: TypeScript support included without additional installation. Repository is 99.6% TypeScript.

ssr-compatible.comment: jQuery-free architecture makes it SSR compatible. Works with Next.js and other SSR frameworks. v3 adds 'use client' directives for Next.js App Router compatibility.

rsc-compatible.comment: v3.0.0-beta.2 adds 'use client' directive where needed, indicating client component architecture rather than RSC compatibility.

design-system.comment: Based on Semantic UI design system which uses natural language principles and human-friendly HTML. Not Material Design or Ant Design.

dark-mode.comment: No built-in dark mode. Theming requires custom CSS/LESS configuration.

theming-system.comment: Uses Semantic UI's LESS-based theming system with customizable variables. Requires Webpack with LESS loader for full theming.

css-variables.comment: Uses LESS variables rather than CSS custom properties. Theming done at compile time, not runtime.

design-tokens.comment: Uses LESS variables for theming but not a modern design token system.

rtl-support.comment: Semantic UI supports RTL layouts through its CSS framework.

component-count.comment: 40+ main components organized into Elements, Collections, Views, Modules, and Addons categories.

text-input.comment: Input component with various types (text, password, etc.) and action/labeled variants.

textarea.comment: TextArea component available as an addon.

select.comment: Select component (simplified Dropdown) for single selection.

multi-select.comment: Dropdown component supports multiple selection mode.

combobox.comment: Dropdown component with search prop enables searchable/filterable autocomplete.

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with toggle, slider, and fitted variants.

radio.comment: Radio component available as an addon.

switch-toggle.comment: Checkbox component with toggle or slider prop creates a switch-style toggle.

slider.comment: No range slider component. Checkbox has a 'slider' variant but it's a toggle, not a range input.

number-input.comment: Input component supports type='number' but no dedicated number input with increment/decrement buttons.

tag-input.comment: No dedicated tag input component. Can be built using Dropdown with multiple and allowAdditions props.

date-picker.comment: No built-in date picker. Third-party libraries like react-datepicker commonly used with Semantic UI styling.

file-upload.comment: Input can be used with type='file' but no dedicated file upload component with preview.

dropzone.comment: No drag-and-drop file upload area component.

rating-input.comment: Rating component for star rating input with customizable icons and max rating.

input-groups.comment: Input component supports labeled (left/right labels) and action (buttons) addons.

input-with-dropdown.comment: Labeled Input variant supports dropdown labels for combinations like country code + phone.

button-groups.comment: Button.Group component for grouped/segmented buttons with conditional and basic styling.

split-button.comment: No dedicated split button. Can be built using Button.Group with Dropdown.

table.comment: Table component with striped, selectable, sortable, and other variants.

data-table.comment: Table component exists but no advanced DataTable with built-in sorting/filtering/pagination. Users integrate with external libraries.

list-view.comment: List component with bulleted, ordered, animated, and content variations.

card.comment: Card component with image, header, meta, description, and extra content areas.

avatar.comment: No dedicated Avatar component. Image component with avatar prop provides circular styling but no fallback.

badge.comment: Label component can function as a badge when attached to other elements.

tag-chip-pill.comment: Label component functions as tag/chip with optional close icon and various colors.

alert.comment: Message component for static alert/banner messages with info, warning, error, and success variants.

toast-notification.comment: No built-in toast/notification component. Message component is static, not temporary popup.

progress-bar.comment: Progress component for determinate progress indication with color and label options.

progress-circle.comment: Only linear progress bar available. No circular progress indicator.

spinner-loader.comment: Loader component for indeterminate loading states with various sizes.

skeleton.comment: Placeholder component provides skeleton loading states for content.

modal-dialog.comment: Modal component for centered overlay dialogs with header, content, and actions.

drawer-sheet.comment: Sidebar component slides in from edge (left, right, top, bottom).

popover.comment: Popup component for floating content anchored to trigger with various positions.

tooltip.comment: Popup component with basic prop creates a tooltip for hover hint text.

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown component for action menus with items and dividers.

tabs.comment: Tab component for tab-based content switching.

vertical-tabs.comment: Menu component with vertical prop provides side-oriented tab navigation.

breadcrumb.comment: Breadcrumb component for hierarchical path navigation with customizable dividers.

pagination.comment: Pagination addon for page navigation controls.

stepper.comment: Step component for multi-step process indication with completed, active, and disabled states.

navigation-menu.comment: Menu component for site navigation with dropdown submenu support.

sidebar.comment: Sidebar component for collapsible sidebar navigation with pushable content.

bottom-navigation.comment: No dedicated mobile-style bottom navigation bar component.

grid.comment: 16-column responsive Grid component with Row and Column sub-components.

stack.comment: No dedicated Stack component. Grid with stackable prop provides responsive stacking behavior.

container.comment: Container component for centered, max-width content.

divider.comment: Divider component for horizontal/vertical separators with optional text.

aspect-ratio.comment: Embed component maintains aspect ratio for embedded content (videos, iframes).

collapsible.comment: Accordion component for expandable/collapsible content sections.

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations.

chart-libraries.comment: Statistic component for displaying numbers but no chart integrations.

form-libraries.comment: Built-in Form component with validation but no official bindings to external form libraries like react-hook-form or Formik.

animation-libraries.comment: Transition and TransitionGroup components provide built-in animations (fade, scale, slide, etc.).

icon-libraries.comment: Icon component uses Font Awesome icons by default. Subset of icons included in Semantic UI CSS.

date-libraries.comment: No date picker means no official date library integrations.

aria-compliant.comment: Known accessibility issues. Modal lacks proper focus management, Dropdown has screen reader issues, Tab lacks ARIA attributes. Community has raised comprehensive WCAG concerns.

keyboard-navigation.comment: Keyboard support exists for some components but is incomplete. Dropdown is keyboard accessible but some components like Modal have issues.

screen-reader-tested.comment: Known screen reader issues documented. Dropdown options not read aloud, Modal lacks proper ARIA, Labels not bound to inputs by default.

focus-management.comment: Modal does not move keyboard focus into the modal, making it inaccessible to keyboard and screen reader users.

wcag-level.comment: No documented WCAG compliance. Comprehensive accessibility review found issues across most base components.

accessibility-rating.comment: Basic accessibility with known gaps. Some ARIA attributes present, some keyboard support, but Modal lacks focus trapping, Dropdown has screen reader issues, and many accessibility features are optional rather than default.

bundle-size-full.comment: Approximately 230KB minified JavaScript (170KB library + 60KB lodash dependency). Gzipped builds come under 60KB.

bundle-size-core.comment: Selective imports possible via paths like 'semantic-ui-react/dist/commonjs/elements/Button' to reduce bundle size.

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports tree-shaking with selective imports. babel-plugin-transform-semantic-ui-react-imports helps optimize bundle.

zero-runtime.comment: Requires Semantic UI CSS at runtime. Components render HTML that expects CSS classes.

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be lazy-loaded using React.lazy() and dynamic imports.

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with comprehensive API reference, code examples, usage guides, composition patterns, and migration guide for v3. Interactive examples in docs.

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes live component examples with editable code.

figma-kit.comment: No official Figma kit. Community Sketch kit exists which can be imported into Figma.

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool for scaffolding. Install via npm and import components directly.

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 256,298 weekly downloads as of December 2025.

commercial-support.comment: No paid support or enterprise tier. Community-supported open source project.

style-override.comment: Override styles via className and style props. Theming requires LESS customization at build time.

compound-components.comment: Uses compound component pattern extensively (e.g., Button.Group, Card.Content, Modal.Header, Table.Row).

render-props.comment: Uses shorthand props pattern rather than render props for customization.

slots.comment: No named slot pattern. Uses compound components and content props instead.

unstyled-mode.comment: Components render semantic HTML expecting Semantic UI CSS. Cannot use without styles.
